subsections.text: “Department” means the Texas Department of Transportation.
“Director” means the executive director of the Texas Department of Transportation.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: In this subtitle, “toll project” means one or more tolled lanes of a highway or an entire toll highway constructed, maintained, or operated as a part of the state highway system and any improvement, extension, or expansion to the highway, including:
a facility to relieve traffic congestion and promote safety;
a bridge, tunnel, overpass, underpass, interchange, entrance plaza, approach, toll booth, toll plaza, service road, ramp, or service center;
an administration, storage, or other building, operations center, maintenance or other facility, equipment, or system the department considers necessary to operate the project;
property rights, easements, and interests the department acquires to construct, maintain, or operate the project;
a parking area or structure, rest stop, park, and any other improvement or amenity the department considers necessary, useful, or beneficial for the operation and maintenance of the project; and

a nontolled facility that is appurtenant to and necessary for the efficient operation and maintenance of the project, including a connector, service road, access road, ramp, interchange, bridge, or tunnel.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: In this chapter, “local transportation entity” means an entity that participates in the transportation planning process, including:
a regional tollway authority under Chapter 366 (Regional Tollway Authorities) ;
a rapid transportation authority under Chapter 451 (Metropolitan Rapid Transit Authorities) ;
a regional transportation authority under Chapter 452 (Regional Transportation Authorities) ;
a rural transit district under Chapter 458 (Rural and Urban Transit Districts) ;
a coordinated county transportation authority under Chapter 460 (Coordinated County Transportation Authorities) ; or
a metropolitan planning organization under Subchapter D (Definitions) , Chapter 472 (Miscellaneous Provisions) .

history.raw: Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2011.
